title: Sulfur Slimes
description: A new Sulfur Caves biome where Sulfur and Cinnabar Slimes spawn
body:
This is a fan-made recreation of the minecraft update "Chaos Cubed".

This mod adds Sulfur and Cinnabar slimes with a lot of new features like the Sulfur Bomb or Liquid Sulfur.

Sulfurs and Cinnabar slimes can split and explode on death, be careful!
